source_signal_disposition.signal: Workflow phase skills should not remain prompt text only.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if phase skills are represented only as prose guidance.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Phase skills are recommended defaults, not automatic execution or default gates.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if recommended skills auto-execute or block completion by default.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Soft audit records used or clearly relevant skipped/unavailable skills only.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if audit becomes an exhaustive checklist.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Active phase prompt tells the agent to pay special attention and invoke only when relevant.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if prompt semantics become weaker than ordinary prose or stronger than mandatory invocation.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Phase binding must not duplicate skill-owned reason/appliesWhen metadata.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if workflow templates become the source of skill applicability.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Skill references are names-first with qualified metadata only when needed.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if all bindings require verbose fully qualified references without need.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Phase skills come from the shared Settings-backed skill catalog.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if workflow authoring uses a separate skill inventory.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Workflow phases bind to skills, not plugins; plugins are provenance/dependency.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if workflow schema stores plugin as the primary binding target.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Workflow export includes template plus skill dependency manifest.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if export emits only names without dependency metadata.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Workflow export does not bundle skill contents by default.
source_signal_disposition.artifact_location: spec.md FR-012; spec.md#Deferred Or Future Scope
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if first scope copies arbitrary skill files.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Missing recommended skills allow import with warnings and preserved unavailable references.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if missing recommended skills block import or are silently dropped.

source_signal_disposition.signal: UI mainline is phase-local selector, import/export diagnostics, and lightweight runtime evidence.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if authoring is only workflow-level or runtime UI becomes noisy.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Skill-derived permissions, shell behavior, hooks, forked agents, model, and effort must not bypass safety boundaries.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen if workflow runtime grants capabilities outside normal SkillTool permissions.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Required/contract phase skills remain future scope.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen when product explicitly requests mandatory phase skill evidence.

source_signal_disposition.signal: Explicit bundle mode is future scope for reviewed project-owned skills.
source_signal_disposition.reopen_trigger: Reopen when product explicitly requests reviewed skill bundle mode.

consequence_gate.trigger_reason: Phase skill bindings affect workflow lifecycle, import/export compatibility, runtime prompts, skill permissions, session resume, final reports, and user trust boundaries.
